title: GEMMAHW 12CM Large S Hooks for Hanging (10-Pack), Black Iron S Hooks for Kitchen, Bathroom, Garden, Heavy Duty, Rust Resistant, Easy Install, Reusable
features: [10-Pack Large S Hooks] Our S hooks for hanging come in a pack of 10, featuring a robust 12cm(4.8") large size and a sturdy S-shape that ensures exceptional load-bearing capacity, making them perfect for heavy-duty use.

[High-Quality Build] Crafted from premium electroplated iron and coated with waterproof black paint, black S hooks boast a sleek matte finish that provides excellent rust, wear, and corrosion resistance for long-lasting durability.

[Safety Features] Each end of our S shaped hooks is equipped with rounded tips that protect your hands from scratches while also preventing hanging items from slipping off, ensuring safe and secure storage.

[Easy Installation] The hanging hooks require no additional tools like screws or adhesives for setup, allowing for instant application and removal. The flexible design adapts easily to various small spaces, making organization a breeze.

[Versatile Utility] Metal hooks for hanging are ideal for diverse locations such as kitchens, bathrooms, gardens, warehouses, garages, supermarkets, and offices, enabling effective space-saving solutions anywhere.
